epigraph.quote: John was feeding ducks & said "Mummy, why don't they make ducks with fur?"

moments.quote: After aligning the van twice, with Eve walking ahead to point the glaring headlights exactly to the middle of the bridge walls

moments.place: Westermill Farm, Exford, Exmoor, Somerset, UK
moments.quote: The river runs along the edge of the site + is damned into a pool which John + Charles love.

images.caption: John + Charles at the pond at Westermill Farm
